ManagedAttribute.displayName: Read all shared cross-tenant user profiles and export their data [on] Microsoft Graph

entry.value: Allows the application to list and query any shared user profile information associated with the current tenant without a signed-in user. It also permits the application to export external user data (e.g. customer content or system-generated logs), for any user associated with the current tenant without a signed-in user.
Read all shared cross-tenant user profiles and export their data [on] Microsoft Graph
